final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Drammen';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid AS id, bygningsid AS gml_id, kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301';
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 2 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 2, "action": "query"}

1.description: Get kommunenummer and geometry for Drammen

2.description: Get buildings in Drammen (building id and point geometry)

3.description: Get flood zone polygons (flomareal) — we'll filter to 200-year if attribute found; otherwise include for spatial join

5.description: Find buildings that intersect flood zones (intersects)

6.description: Find nearest quick-clay hazard zone for each building and compute distance

7.description: Sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay ascending

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Drammen';
